page_content:
Formerly: EDHI670.

EDUC671 Education Law, Finance and Policy (3 Credits)

An examination of the way judicial interpretation of common, statutory, and constitutional law shapes and constrains educational policy making. In addition, this course is designed to introduce students to issues related to the financing and resource management of public elementary and secondary schools and school systems in the United States.

All discussions include dimensions of both theory and practice and specifically address reform in terms of alternatives to current practice.
